positive: A stunning, stylized minimalist representation of a rising sun over a stylized mountain range. The sun is rendered as a perfect, glowing semi-circle, casting sharp, vibrant golden-orange rays that dramatically intersect with deep indigo and turquoise gradient sky. The mountains are bold, geometric silhouettes, interlocking with clean, crisp edges. Overall style is geometric modernism meets retro-futurism, perfect for screen printing on fabric. High contrast, flat color fields, dramatic volumetric lighting, central composition, vector illustration quality, negative space utilization, suitable for large-format apparel printing.
negative: blurry, low contrast, grain, text, watermark, logo, signature, anime, cartoon, messy, artifacts, poor anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate, low detail
